title: Event
description: Minimal contract for an event emitted by a run or step.

run_id.description: Run identifier associated with this event.

step_id.description: Optional step identifier associated with this event.

event_type.description: Typed event identifier. Examples include step.failed, run.failed, run.retry_started, and run.retry_completed.

trace_id.description: Trace identifier associated with this event.

span_id.description: Span identifier associated with this event.

sequence.description: Monotonic event sequence within a run.

status.description: Runtime status associated with this event.

started_at.description: Start timestamp associated with this event.

ended_at.description: End timestamp associated with this event.

duration_ms.description: Duration in milliseconds associated with this event.

error.description: Error message associated with this event.
